| name = Tsuchimikado Ariharu
| image = 
| caption = 
| period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}
| birth_date = {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|WD=Q1324885|lt=Bunki|1=Bunki}} 1 ({{ill|1501|en|1501|WD=Q6131|lt=1501|1=1501}})
| death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 12, {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19 (old calendar)|1=June 19}} ({{ill|1569|en|1569|WD=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}} {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|WD=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}})
| Rank = {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}
| lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}
| family = {{ill|Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado family|ja|土御門家 (安倍氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado family|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 阿倍氏}}
| parents = Father: {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja|土御門有季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; Adoptive father: {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja|土御門有宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| siblings = {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja|土御門有宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, '''Ariharu'''; Adoptive sibling: {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arihisa|ja|土御門有尚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arihisa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| spouse = Unknown
| children = {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arinaga|ja|土御門有脩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arinaga|qq=}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
}}

'''Tsuchimikado Ariharu''' (土御門 有春) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} during the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He was the 29th head of the {{ill|Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado family|ja|土御門家 (安倍氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado family|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 阿倍氏}}, a {{ill|dōjō family|ja|堂上家|1=Tōshōke|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dōjō family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11427847}} of the {{ill|han-ke|ja|半家|1=Half-house (Kuge)|2=ja|3=半家 (公家)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/han-ke|qq=}} Rank in the {{ill|Abe clan|ja|阿倍氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|qq=}} lineage.

== Biography ==
Tsuchimikado Ariharu was the son of {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja|土御門有季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who served as {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. 

In {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 12, on {{ill|July 28|en|July 28|WD=Q2718|lt=July 28 (old calendar)|1=July 28}} ({{ill|1543|en|1543|WD=Q6523|lt=1543|1=1543}} {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|WD=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}}), he assumed the position of {{ill|Ministry of Ceremonies (Japan)|ja|治部卿|lt=Minister of Ceremonies|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Ceremonies (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 治部省|1=Ministry of Ceremonies (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10829855}}. His official Ranks included {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}.

During his tenure, the rival {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}}, particularly the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}, faced turmoil. {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}}, head of the Kadenokōji family, saw his son {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}} abandon Kyoto with his family to study astronomy and Christianity in {{ill|Funai (Bungo Province)|ja|豊後府内|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai (Bungo Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. After Akitomi's death in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 8 ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}), Ariharu's son {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was adopted by the Kadenokōji family to preserve its lineage.

== Lineage ==

=== Family ===
* Father: {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja|土御門有季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arisue|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Senior Second Rank|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}})
* Mother: Unknown
* Adoptive father: {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja|土御門有宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Spouse: Unknown
* Children:
** {{ill|Tsuchimikado Arinaga|ja|土御門有脩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Arinaga|qq=}}
** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (adopted into the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}})
